product.name: Calbee Jagabee Potato Sticks - Purple Potato

metaData.Key Information: • Crispy, delicious and full of the irresistible prawn taste

• Calbee Crispy Potato (Hot & Spicy) delivers great texture
• With a perfectly blended spicy flavour to fire up your tastebuds

product.name: Calbee Crispy Potato Chips - Hot & Spicy

metaData.Key Information: Made using real potatoes, these addictive potato sticks are bound to satisfy with the mellow honey and butter flavour and are convenient to bring around!

product.name: Calbee Jagabee Potato Sticks - Honey Butter

product.description: Savour and snack away with FairPrice Original Potato Sticks. Made from 100% fresh potatoes transformed into crunchy sticks with lightly salted flavour, they're irresistible!

metaData.Ingredients:
Potato, Palm Oil, Sugar, Salt, Flavour Enhancers (E621, E631, E627), Yeast Extract Powder, Cabbage Extract Powder, Kelp Extract Powder and Anti-Caking Agent (E551).

Processed In A Facility That Also Processes Cereals Containing Gluten, Crustacean, Eggs, Fish, Peanuts, Soybeans, Milk, Sesame, Sulphites, Tree Nuts and Nut Products.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place, away from direct sunlight and heat. Best consumed after opening to maintain crispiness.

product.name: FairPrice Potato Sticks - Original

metaData.Ingredients: Dried Potato, Vegetable Oil (Palm Olein), Wheat Starch, Rice Flour, Emulsifier (Vegetable Origin), Maltodextrin, Salt, Dextrose, Citric Acid
metaData.Key Information:
• Bursting with flavour
• No artificial colours

product.description: FAIRPRICE POTATO CHIPS - ORIGINAL JUMBO PACK 165G

metaData.Key Information: Made from 100% fresh potatoes and sprinkled with a tinge of salt, Fairprice original flavour potato chips are so crispy and irresistible that one is never enough! This product suitable for vegetarian diet.
metaData.SAP Product Name: FAIRPRICE POTATO CHIPS - ORIGINAL JUMBO PACK 165G

product.name: FairPrice Potato Chips - Original

offers.description: Buy 1 Lay's Fries Potato Sticks - Original @ $4.40

metaData.Key Information: The salted classic, thicker, sturdier potato chips with Ruffles trademarked ridges.

product.description: Savour and snack away with FairPrice Seaweed Potato Sticks. Made from 100% fresh potatoes transformed into crunchy sticks with savoury seaweed flavour, they're irresistible!

metaData.Ingredients:
Potato, Palm Oil, Salt, Seaweed Powder, Flavour Enhancers (E621, E631, E627), Kelp Extract Powder, Sugar, Soybean Sauce Powder [Soy Sauce (Soybean, Wheat, Salt), Maltodextrin, Salt], Hydrolysed Wheat Protein, Black Pepper Powder and Sweetener (E955).

Processed In A Facility That Also Processes Cereals Containing Gluten, Crustacean, Eggs, Fish, Peanuts, Soybeans, Milk, Sesame, Sulphites, Tree Nuts and Nut Products.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place, away from direct sunlight and heat. Best consumed after opening to maintain crispiness.

product.name: FairPrice Potato Sticks - Seaweed

metaData.Key Information: • Lightly salted flavour bringing out the rich taste of potatoes

product.description: Snack away with FairPrice Original Potato Crisps. Each crisp is perfectly salted and full of flavour, you'll keep coming back for more!

metaData.Ingredients:
Potato Flakes [Potato, Emulsifier (E471), Acid Regulator (E330)], Palm Oil [Contains Anti-Oxidant (E319)], Modified Starch (E1412), Sugar, Potato Starch, Salt, Emulsifier (E471), Emulsifier [Ins322(I)] (Contains Soy), Acid Regulator (E330), Flavour Enhancer (E635) and Colour [Ins160A(I)].

Processed In A Facility That Also Processes Cereals Containing Gluten, Eggs, Soybeans and Milk Products.
metaData.Key Information:
• Naturally Trans Fat Free
• Naturally Cholesterol Free
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place, away from direct sunlight and heat. Best consumed after opening to maintain crispiness.

product.name: FairPrice Potato Crisps - Original

product.description: Savour and snack away with FairPrice Sweet Potato Sticks. Made from 100% fresh sweet potatoes transformed into crunchy sticks with naturally sweet flavour, they're irresistible!

metaData.Ingredients:
Sweet Potatoes, Palm Oil, Sugar, Salt and Yeast Extract Powder.

Processed In A Facility That Also Processes Cereals Containing Gluten, Crustacean, Eggs, Fish, Peanuts, Soybeans, Milk, Sesame, Sulphites, Tree Nuts and Nut Products.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place, away from direct sunlight and heat. Best consumed after opening to maintain crispiness.

product.name: FairPrice Potato Sticks - Sweet Potato

offers.description: Buy 1 FairPrice Potato Sticks - Sweet Potato @ $3.95

metaData.Ingredients: Potato, Vegetable Oil, Milk, Lactose, Whey Protein Concentrate, Buttermilk Powder, Salt, Dehydrated Carrot (Carrot, Sugar), Parsley, Pepper, Emulsifier [322, 471, 473], Flavour Enhancer [621, 635], Flavouring, Antioxidant [304(I)].Contains: Soybean, Milk.
metaData.Key Information: Designed to deliver a satisfying crunch, with the simple flavour allowing you to enjoy the delicious taste of the ingredients used.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place. Once opened, consume early to enjoy crispness.
